subject: Jordan Ashley Barney

placements.name: Sun
placements.notes: Conjunct North Node and Mars — core identity IS soul path and daily work

placements.name: Moon
placements.notes: 10th house — career and emotional life are the same organ

placements.name: Mercury
placements.notes: Scorpio stellium — investigative, goes all the way in

placements.name: Venus
placements.notes: Scorpio stellium — deep loyalty, full presence

placements.name: Mars
placements.notes: Conjunct Sun and North Node — drive and identity are the same signal

placements.name: Jupiter
placements.notes: Scorpio stellium — expands creative depth; first to be trined by transiting Cancer planets

placements.name: Saturn
placements.notes: Structure via ideology and belief systems; 9th house = the long arc

placements.name: Uranus
placements.notes: Generational; 7th house = disruption through partnership; conjunct natal Neptune

placements.name: Neptune
placements.notes: Generational; 7th house = idealization in relationships; conjunct natal Uranus

placements.name: Pluto
placements.notes: Scorpio stellium deepest point — transformation as creative power; generational but personally prominent in 5th

placements.name: North Node
placements.notes: Conjunct Sun + Mars — authentic direction IS the soul path; 6th house = daily work is the vehicle

placements.name: South Node
placements.notes: Mirroring survival pattern; adapting to others' frequencies before finding one's own

placements.name: Chiron
placements.notes: Wound: perfectionism, enoughness, home/body. 4th house = private self

placements.name: Ascendant
placements.notes: ANARETIC DEGREE — 29° Gemini, threshold degree; Gemini at maximum concentration; South Node close by

placements.name: Midheaven
placements.notes: Pisces MC — public identity has Neptunian, dissolving quality; public and private harder to separate

stelliums.name: Scorpio 5th House Stellium
stelliums.theme: The privately held, most intensely felt part of the chart. Romance, creative work, passion projects. All the way in or not at all.

stelliums.name: Sagittarius 6th House Stellium
stelliums.theme: Daily work IS identity expression and soul path. The task is to go toward authentic direction over adaptive mirroring.

key_axes.name: Gemini–Sagittarius Axis
key_axes.notes: Most loaded axis in the chart. Uranus transiting Gemini will aspect all of these over 2026–2034.

key_axes.name: 7th House Capricorn Cluster
key_axes.notes: Generational planets in the house of partnership — disruption and dissolution through relationship

pattern_notes.south_node_mirroring: South Node 3° Gemini (12th) + Ascendant 29° Gemini: the mirroring pattern is both natal character and soul-level habit. Tendency to adapt to others' frequencies before finding own register.
pattern_notes.aries_moon_10th: Moon in Aries in the 10th: career recognition is emotionally personal. Professional slights hit the nervous system directly. Not a weakness — the chart's architecture.
pattern_notes.anaretic_ascendant: 29° Gemini Ascendant: threshold degree. Gemini has finished its learning and is at the graduation point. The presentation self is more concentrated, more intentional than a typical Gemini rising.
pattern_notes.5th_house_depth: Scorpio stellium in the 5th: joy is never surface. Creative work and romance both operate at full depth. The passion is real but it's not casual.

source: Time Passages + manual calculation via Placidus, Palo Alto CA 1993-11-23 18:36 PST
